title: althaea lavateriflora var. glabrescens
intro: Althaea lavateriflora var. glabrescens, also known as Glabrous Marsh Mallow, is a variety of the Marsh Mallow plant that is native to China and is used for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which are attributed to its high mucilage content. This mucilage can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, resulting in a range of health benefits including relief from irritable bowel syndrome, eczema, and skin irritations. Althaea lavateriflora var. glabrescens is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and creams, which are often consumed or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
